name: doctor --check sbom emits a software bill of materials for the root and stays green
command: printf '{"dependencies":{"express":"4.18.0"}}' > package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check sbom --root . 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'sbom format=cyclonedx' e.txt && echo x10-sbom-check 1>&2
